completed_steps.summary: Classified as monorepo with 2 parts (web, backend)
Found 11 existing docs (root README, both app READMEs, API_CONSUMER_GUIDE + 6 module docs in app-backend)
Tech stack: Next.js 15 + React 19 (web); NestJS 11 + Prisma 7 + PostgreSQL 18 (backend)
Quick-scan: 6 controllers (auth, categories, products, catalog, orders public+admin), 12 Prisma models + 9 enums, 8 migrations, 15 services on web
Annotated source tree written for both parts (source-tree-analysis.md, 410 lines)
Per-part development guides + deployment guide written
Integration architecture documented (REST/JSON, /uploads, SMTP, Google OAuth)
Supporting docs: project-overview, component-inventory-web, api-contracts-backend, data-models-backend, project-parts.json
Master index.md generated with cross-links and getting-started
Scanned for incomplete-doc markers; none found

technology_stack.web: Next.js 15.2.8 + React 19 + TS 5 (Axios, RHF + zod, SCSS modules, next-themes, recharts, sonner, firebase)
technology_stack.backend: NestJS 11 + Express 5 + Prisma 7 + PostgreSQL 18 + Passport (JWT, local, optional Google) + multer + nodemailer + Swagger

api_endpoints.auth_routes: POST /auth/register, register-minimal, login, refresh, logout, forgot-password, reset-password, onboarding/complete; GET/PATCH /auth/me; PATCH /auth/establishment{,/pix,/logo}; GET /auth/google + /auth/google/callback (conditional)

findings.data_models: 12 Prisma models / 9 enums (User, AuthProvider, AuthToken, PasswordResetToken, Establishment, EstablishmentType, EstablishmentEstablishmentType, Address, Contact, UserEstablishment, Category, Product, Order, OrderItem)
